{{infobox football tournament season
|title           = Copa do Brasil
|year            = 1997
|other_titles    = Copa do Brasil 1997
|image           =
|image_size       = 250px
|caption         = 
|country         = Brazil
|dates           = February 18 – May 22
|num_teams       = 45
|winners       = [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]
|second       = [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]
|matches         = 78
|goals           = 267
|scoring_leader = [[Paulo Nunes]] (8)
|award          = 
|prev_season      = [[1996 Copa do Brasil|1996]]
|next_season      = [[1998 Copa do Brasil|1998]]
}}

The '''Copa do Brasil 1997''' was the 9th staging of the [[Copa do Brasil]].

The competition started on February 18, 1997, and concluded on May 22, 1997, with the second leg of the final, held at the [[Estádio do Maracanã]] in [[Rio de Janeiro]], in which [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]] lifted the trophy for the third time after a 2-2 draw with [[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo]].

[[Paulo Nunes]], of [[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]], with 9 goals, was the competition's topscorer.

==Format==
The preliminary round was disputed by 26 clubs, while the first stage was disputed by 32 clubs, including the ones qualified from the preliminary stage. The competition was disputed in a [[Single-elimination tournament|knock-out]] format. In the preliminary stage and in the first round if the away team won the first leg with an advantage of at least two goals, the second leg was not played and the club automatically qualified to the next round. The following rounds were played over two legs and the [[away goals rule]] was used.

==Competition stages==

===Preliminary round===
{{TwoLegStart}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Bacabal Esporte Clube|Bacabal (MA)]]||WO|'''[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]'''||WO|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Clube de Regatas Guará|Guará (DF)]]||0-7|'''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''||0-7|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Mixto Esporte Clube|Mixto (MT)]]||0-3|'''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''||0-3|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ypiranga Clube|Ypiranga (AP)]]||1-5|'''[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]'''||1-0|0-5}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Centro Sportivo Alagoano|CSA (AL)]]||2-6|'''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''||2-6|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Operário Futebol Clube (MS)|Operário (MS)]]||3-8|'''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''||2-2|1-6}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Desportiva Capixaba|Desportiva (ES)]]||2-6|'''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''||1-1|1-5}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Paysandu Sport Club|Paysandu (PA)]]||2-4|'''[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]'''||2-1|0-3}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Santa Cruz Recreativo Esporte Clube|Santa Cruz (PB)]]||0-4|'''[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]'''||0-4|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|'''[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]'''||4-3|[[Baré Esporte Clube|Baré (RR)]]||3-2|1-1}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Kaburé Esporte Clube|Kaburé (TO)]]||1-9|'''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]'''||1-1|0-8}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[Ji-Paraná Futebol Clube|Ji-Paraná (RO)]]||1-3|'''[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]'''||1-3|-}}
{{TwoLegResult|[[América Futebol Clube (MG)|América (MG)]]||1-3|'''[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]]'''||1-1|0-2}}
|}

===Knockout stages===
{{32TeamBracket
| RD1-team01 =[[Club Sportivo Sergipe|Sergipe (SE)]]
| RD1-team02 ='''[[Club de Regatas Vasco da Gama|Vasco (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score01=3
| RD1-score02=5
| RD1-team03 ='''[[Clube Atlético Paranaense|Atlético (PR)]]'''
| RD1-team04 =[[Sport Club do Recife|Sport (PE)]]
| RD1-score03=3 1
| RD1-score04=0 1
| RD1-team05 ='''[[Sport Club Corinthians Paulista|Corinthians (SP)]]'''
| RD1-team06 =[[Esporte Clube Juventude|Juventude (RS)]]
| RD1-score05=2 0 (pen: 5)
| RD1-score06=0 2 (pen: 3)
| RD1-team07 =[[Clube do Remo|Remo (PA)]]
| RD1-team08 ='''[[Clube Atlético Mineiro|Atlético (MG)]]'''
| RD1-score07=3 2
| RD1-score08=3 3
| RD1-team09 =[[América Futebol Clube (RN)|América (RN)]]
| RD1-team10 ='''[[Associação Portuguesa de Desportos|Portuguesa (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score09=1 0
| RD1-score10=0 3
| RD1-team11 =[[Fortaleza Esporte Clube|Fortaleza (CE)]]
| RD1-team12 ='''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score11=2 1
| RD1-score12=3 3
| RD1-team13 =[[Botafogo de Futebol e Regatas|Botafogo (RJ)]]
| RD1-team14 ='''[[Esporte Clube Vitória|Vitória (BA)]]'''
| RD1-score13=0
| RD1-score14=3
| RD1-team15 =[[Vila Nova Futebol Clube|Vila Nova (GO)]]
| RD1-team16 ='''[[São Paulo Futebol Clube|São Paulo (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score15=2 0
| RD1-score16=3 2
| RD1-team17 =[[Figueirense Futebol Clube|Figueirense (SC)]]
| RD1-team18 ='''[[Santos Futebol Clube|Santos (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score17=0 2
| RD1-score18=1 3
| RD1-team19 =[[Paraná Clube|Paraná (PR)]]
| RD1-team20 ='''[[Sport Club Internacional|Internacional (RS)]]'''
| RD1-score19=1 0
| RD1-score20=1 3
| RD1-team21 =[[Nacional Futebol Clube|Nacional (AM)]]
| RD1-team22 ='''[[Clube de Regatas do Flamengo|Flamengo (RJ)]]'''
| RD1-score21=2
| RD1-score22=6
| RD1-team23 ='''[[Rio Branco Football Club|Rio Branco (AC)]]'''
| RD1-team24 =[[Goiás Esporte Clube|Goiás (GO)]]
| RD1-score23=1 1
| RD1-score24=0 2
| RD1-team25 =[[Esporte Clube Bahia|Bahia (BA)]])
| RD1-team26 ='''[[Coritiba Foot Ball Club|Coritiba (PR)]]'''
| RD1-score25=2 0
| RD1-score26=2 1
| RD1-team27 =[[River Atlético Clube|River (PI)]]
| RD1-team28 ='''[[Sociedade Esportiva Palmeiras|Palmeiras (SP)]]'''
| RD1-score27=0 1
| RD1-score28=0 7
| RD1-team29 ='''[[Ceará Sporting Club|Ceará (CE)]]'''
| RD1-team30 =[[Fluminense Football Club|Fluminense (RJ)]]
| RD1-score29=1 0
| RD1-score30=0 0
| RD1-team31 ='''[[Santa Cruz Futebol Clube|Santa Cruz (PE)]]'''
| RD1-team32 =[[Cruzeiro Esporte Clube|Cruzeiro (MG)]]
| RD1-score31=1 1
| RD1-score32=1 0

| RD2-team01 =Vasco (RJ)
| RD2-team02 ='''Atlético (PR)'''
| RD2-score01=1 3
| RD2-score02=3 4
| RD2-team03 ='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD2-team04 =Atlético (MG)
| RD2-score03=1 1
| RD2-score04=0 1
| RD2-team05 =Portuguesa (SP)
| RD2-team06 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD2-score05=1 1
| RD2-score06=2 1
| RD2-team07 ='''Vitória (BA)'''
| RD2-team08 =São Paulo (SP)
| RD2-score07=2 2
| RD2-score08=1 2
| RD2-team09 =Santos (SP)
| RD2-team10 ='''Internacional (RS)'''
| RD2-score09=2 0 (pen: 2)
| RD2-score10=0 2 (pen: 3)
| RD2-team11 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD2-team12 =Rio Branco (AC)
| RD2-score11=1 5
| RD2-score12=2 1
| RD2-team13 =Coritiba (PR)
| RD2-team14 ='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD2-score13=0 2
| RD2-score14=1 4
| RD2-team15 ='''Ceará (CE)'''
| RD2-team16 =Santa Cruz (PE)
| RD2-score15=3 1
| RD2-score16=2 0

| RD3-team01 =Atlético (PR)
| RD3-team02 ='''Corinthians (SP)'''
| RD3-score01=2 2
| RD3-score02=1 6
| RD3-team03 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD3-team04 =Vitória (BA)
| RD3-score03=2 3
| RD3-score04=0 3
| RD3-team05 =Internacional (RS)
| RD3-team06 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD3-score05=1 0
| RD3-score06=1 1
| RD3-team07 ='''Palmeiras (SP)'''
| RD3-team08 =Ceará (CE)
| RD3-score07=5 5
| RD3-score08=2 0

| RD4-team01 =Corinthians (SP)
| RD4-team02 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD4-score01=1 1
| RD4-score02=2 1
| RD4-team03 ='''Flamengo (RJ)'''
| RD4-team04 =Palmeiras (SP)
| RD4-score03=2 1
| RD4-score04=0 0

| RD5-team01 ='''Grêmio (RS)'''
| RD5-team02 =Flamengo (RJ)
| RD5-score01=0 2
| RD5-score02=0 2
}}

{| class="wikitable" style="text-align: center; margin: 0 auto;"
|-
!Copa do Brasil<br />1997 Winners
|-
|[[Image:Bandeira do Rio Grande do Sul.svg|100px|Rio Grande do Sul]]<br>'''[[Grêmio Foot-Ball Porto Alegrense|Grêmio]]'''<br/>'''Third Title'''
|}

==References==
* [https://web.archive.org/web/20070901035150/http://paginas.terra.com.br/esporte/rsssfbrasil/tables/cbr1997.htm Copa do Brasil 1997 at RSSSF]
*''Enciclopédia do Futebol Brasileiro'', Volume 2 - Lance, Rio de Janeiro: Aretê Editorial S/A, 2001.

{{Copa do Brasil Seasons}}

{{DEFAULTSORT:Copa Do Brasil 1997}}
[[Category:Copa do Brasil seasons|1997]]
[[Category:1997 in Brazilian football]]
[[Category:1997 in domestic association football cups]]
